_meta.purpose: Populated example instance showing the full shape of an initial-assessment record. References taxonomy IDs from clinical-taxonomies.seed.json.

section_a_patient_referral.chief_complaint: Avoids messy textures, frequent meltdowns in noisy environments, toe-walking, limited eye contact.

section_b_medical_developmental_history.birth_history_complications: Term delivery via emergency C-section due to non-reassuring fetal heart rate. APGAR 7/9.
section_b_medical_developmental_history.neonatal_history: Brief 48h NICU stay for observation; discharged stable.
section_b_medical_developmental_history.past_medical_surgical_history: Recurrent otitis media at age 2; bilateral grommet insertion at age 3.
section_b_medical_developmental_history.current_medications: Multivitamin syrup (5 ml OD). No prescription medications.
section_b_medical_developmental_history.previous_therapies_duration: Speech therapy at private centre, 6 months (3 sessions/week).

section_c_developmental_milestones.notes: Two-word phrases not consistent until 36 months.
In progress; resists toilet for bowel movements.
Cannot manage buttons or zippers; tolerates pull-on clothing only.

ratings.notes: Avoids messy textures; tags on clothing trigger meltdowns.
Covers ears at vacuum cleaner; meltdowns in malls.
Refuses strong-smelling foods; gags on textures.
Limited awareness of toilet needs and hunger.

section_d_sensory_processing_profile.behavioural_observations: Child sought weighted lap pad during transitions. Covered ears repeatedly when corridor noise increased. Avoided sand bin; tolerated rice bin for 2 minutes after modeling.

section_e_functional_fine_motor.clinical_observations_findings: Bilateral coordination at 2nd percentile (BOT-2). Rigid play schemas — lines up cars repeatedly, resists peer entry. Strong proprioceptive seeking. Refuses messy art tasks.

tools_used.scores_summary: Significant sensory sensitivity (>2 SD above mean) and sensory avoiding patterns elevated.

section_f_standardized_assessment_tools.scores_percentiles_summary: Profile consistent with ASD + sensory modulation disorder; bilateral coordination impairment at 2nd percentile; auditory and tactile hyper-responsivity dominant.

short_term_goals_4_6_weeks.description: Tolerate light touch to hands 3/5 trials without distress.
Engage in sand/rice tactile bin play for 5 minutes.
Imitate 3-step motor sequence with 1 verbal prompt.

long_term_goals_3_6_months.description: Independent participation in group sensory activities at school.
Independently use 2+ self-regulation strategies when dysregulated.
Age-appropriate fine motor skills — pre-writing readiness.
Tolerance of varied food textures at mealtimes.

section_g_initial_goals_intervention_pla.home_program_recommendations: Wilbarger brushing protocol 2x daily; 10 min movement break before school; weighted blanket at bedtime; chewy tool during homework; written sensory diet schedule provided.
section_g_initial_goals_intervention_pla.referrals_to_other_specialists: Speech-Language Pathologist (continue current); Developmental Paediatrician for medication review (if meltdowns persist).

_notes: Doctor MUST tag at least one specific milestone (PRD User Story 23) — these tags drive the longitudinal radar chart and recommender.
